allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('byChannel:', d['byChannel']\); print\('byAction:', d['byAction']\)")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5174 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }')
PowerShell(npx next lint --file src/app/page.tsx --file src/components/TraceTimeline.tsx --file src/app/api/traces/route.ts --file src/lib/db.ts 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40)

PowerShell(npx next lint --file src/components/TokenLatencyChart.tsx --file src/components/TokenStatsCards.tsx --file src/components/TokenBreakdown.tsx --file src/app/tokens/page.tsx --file src/lib/tokens.ts)

PowerShell($deadline=\(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(60\); do { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500; try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/api/tokens' -TimeoutSec 30; break } catch { $r=$null } } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); if \($r\) { $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(3000, $r.Content.Length\)\) } else { 'no response' })

PowerShell($from=\(Get-Date\).AddDays\(-30\).ToString\("yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:00"\); $to=\(Get-Date\).ToString\("yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:00"\); $r=Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri "http://localhost:5174/api/tokens?dateFrom=$from&dateTo=$to" -TimeoutSec 60; $j=$r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "totals: " + \($j.totals | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\); "avgLatencyMs: $\($j.avgLatencyMs\)"; "granularity: $\($j.granularity\)"; "buckets with data:"; $j.buckets | Where-Object { $_.calls -gt 0 -or $_.avgLatencyMs -ne $null } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress)
